chapter1/recipe1-1/end/football/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.2.1 to align with the Java 21 migration.
Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
chapter1/recipe1-1/end/football/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 features and potentially causing runtime mismatches if the target environment is strictly Java 21.
